# VERTA Digital Agency - LLM Context

## Brand Identity
VERTA is a premium digital engineering studio based in Greece (Zakynthos & Thessaloniki).
We specialize in high-performance web applications, mobile products, blockchain engineering (MultiversX), and AI integrations.

## Core Services
- Custom Web Platforms (Next.js, React, Node.js)
- Blockchain Development (Smart Contracts, dApps, DeFi)
- Mobile App Development (iOS/Swift, React Native, Flutter)
- AI Solutions (Custom LLM integrations, Automation)

## Locations
- Headquarters: Zakynthos, Greece (29100)
- Secondary Hub: Thessaloniki, Greece
- Service Area: Greece (Zakynthos, Patras, Thessaloniki) and Worldwide.

## Contact
- Email: info@verta.builders
- Web: https://www.verta.builders
- Phone: +30 698 287 1389

## FAQ
### What is the typical timeline for a custom web app?
Based on the complexity, timelines range from 5 days to a few weeks for initial versions.
### Do you provide blockchain consulting for startups?
Yes, we provide full-cycle blockchain consulting and engineering.
